name: Web Research Agent
description: An LLM plans a research task, a Computer-Use agent drives a real browser to navigate and extract data, and a synthesizer turns the captured findings into an answer.

data.label: Plan → operate → synthesize
data.text: The Planner decides what to look for, the Computer-Use node drives a sandboxed browser (screenshot → click → type → screenshot) to gather it, and the Synthesizer writes the answer from what was captured.

data.label: Planner
data.systemPrompt: Turn the goal into a concrete browser task: which site to open and what to extract.

data.label: Browser Operator
data.task: Open the planned URL, navigate to the data, and extract the relevant table or text.

data.label: Synthesizer
data.systemPrompt: Summarize the extracted data into a clear answer to the original goal.
